fields.name: col1_name
fields.label: Calculator Type
fields.description: Pick the calculator first — everything else adapts to your choice

fields.name: col1_type
fields.label: Loan Product
fields.description: Links this calculator to a specific loan product page for analytics and CTA routing

fields.name: col1_label
fields.label: Tab Label
fields.description: Text on the tab button when multiple calculators are grouped. Example: 'EMI Calculator' or 'Check Eligibility'

fields.name: col1_description
fields.label: Subtitle
fields.description: One-line description shown below the calculator heading. Example: 'Calculate your monthly EMI for Home Loan'

fields.name: classes
fields.label: Behaviour
fields.description: Optional flags that change how the calculator renders

fields.name: resultsImageContainer
fields.label: Pie Chart / Result Image
fields.description: The illustration next to the calculated result (typically a donut chart)

fields.name: col1_image
fields.label: Result Image
fields.description: Pick the donut/pie chart image from DAM

fields.name: col1_imageAlt
fields.label: Image Alt Text
fields.description: Accessibility text. Example: 'EMI breakdown pie chart'

fields.name: col1_imageLabel
fields.label: Image Caption
fields.description: Small label displayed alongside the chart. Example: 'Your Monthly EMI'

fields.name: resultsLabelsContainer
fields.label: Result Value Labels
fields.description: Labels next to the two calculated values shown in the result area

fields.name: col1_resPAmount
fields.label: Principal Label
fields.description: Label for the principal amount in results. Default: 'Principal Amount'

fields.name: col1_resInterestAmount
fields.label: Interest Label
fields.description: Label for the interest amount in results. Default: 'Interest Amount'

fields.name: col1_outputMetricsContainer
fields.label: Output Metric Cards (3 cards shown after calculation)
fields.description: Three result cards displayed after calculation: ROI, Savings, and Tenure Reduction. Each needs an icon, alt text, and label.

fields.name: col1_output1Image
fields.label: Card 1 Icon (ROI)
fields.description: Icon for the Net Effective ROI card

fields.name: col1_output1Label
fields.label: Card 1 Label
fields.description: Metric name shown on card. Default: 'Net Effective ROI'

fields.name: col1_output2Image
fields.label: Card 2 Icon (Savings)
fields.description: Icon for the Interest Savings card

fields.name: col1_output2Label
fields.label: Card 2 Label
fields.description: Metric name shown on card. Default: 'You will save Interest of'

fields.name: col1_output3Image
fields.label: Card 3 Icon (Tenure)
fields.description: Icon for the Tenure Reduction card

fields.name: col1_output3Label
fields.label: Card 3 Label
fields.description: Metric name shown on card. Default: 'Reduction in Tenure by'

fields.name: col1_summaryLabelsContainer
fields.label: Summary Row Labels
fields.description: Labels for the summary row below the 3 metric cards

fields.name: col1_totalPaymentsLabel
fields.label: Total Payments Label
fields.description: Default: 'Total Payments'

fields.name: col1_emiLabel
fields.label: EMI Label
fields.description: Default: 'EMI'

fields.name: col1_firstLoanDateContainer
fields.label: Loan Start Date Field
fields.description: Date picker where user enters their first loan EMI date

fields.name: col1_firstLoanDateLabel
fields.label: Field Label
fields.description: Label shown above the date picker. Default: 'First Loan EMI Date'

fields.name: col1_datePlaceholder
fields.label: Date Format Hint
fields.description: Placeholder inside the date field. Default: 'MM/DD/YYYY'

fields.name: col1_datePickerIcon
fields.label: Calendar Icon
fields.description: Small calendar icon shown inside the date picker

fields.name: col1_repaymentScheduleContainer
fields.label: Repayment Schedule Section
fields.description: Section header and clear button for the repayment schedule list

fields.name: col1_repaymentScheduleTitle
fields.label: Section Heading
fields.description: Default: 'Repayment Schedule'

fields.name: col1_clearAllText
fields.label: Clear All Button Text
fields.description: Default: 'Clear All'

fields.name: col1_partPaymentCardContainer
fields.label: Part Payment Entry Form
fields.description: The repeatable card where users enter a part payment date and amount

fields.name: col1_partPaymentDateLabel
fields.label: Date Field Label
fields.description: Label above the date input. Default: 'Enter 1st part payment Date'

fields.name: col1_partPaymentAmountLabel
fields.label: Amount Field Label
fields.description: Label above the amount slider. Default: '1st Part Payment amount (Rs.)'

fields.name: col1_partPaymentMinValue
fields.label: Amount Slider Min
fields.description: Minimum value for the slider (number). Default: 0

fields.name: col1_partPaymentMaxValue
fields.label: Amount Slider Max
fields.description: Maximum value for the slider (number). Default: 2000000 (20 Lakhs)

fields.name: col1_partPaymentMaxLabel
fields.label: Slider Max Display Label
fields.description: Human-readable max shown on slider. Default: '20L'

fields.name: col1_addMoreContainer
fields.label: Add More Part Payment Button
fields.description: Button that lets users add additional part payment entries

fields.name: col1_addMoreIcon
fields.label: Plus Icon
fields.description: The + icon on the 'Add More' button

fields.name: col1_addMoreText
fields.label: Button Label
fields.description: Default: 'Add More Part Payment'

fields.name: col1_showDisclaimer
fields.label: Show Disclaimer Section
fields.description: Turn ON to add a disclaimer below the calculator. Leave OFF to hide it completely.

fields.name: disclaimerContentContainer
fields.label: Disclaimer Content
fields.description: All disclaimer text fields — visible only when Show Disclaimer is ON

fields.name: col1_disclaimerTitle
fields.label: Disclaimer Heading
fields.description: Bold heading above the disclaimer text. Default: 'Disclaimer'

fields.name: col1_disclaimerPara1
fields.label: Always-Visible Text
fields.description: This paragraph is always shown — keep it short (1-2 sentences)

fields.name: col1_disclaimerPara2
fields.label: Read-More Text
fields.description: Hidden by default, revealed when user clicks 'Read more'. Add detailed disclaimers here.

fields.name: col1_readMoreText
fields.label: Expand Button Text
fields.description: Default: 'Read more'

fields.name: col1_readLessText
fields.label: Collapse Button Text
fields.description: Default: 'Read less'

fields.name: col1_name
fields.label: What does this slider control?
fields.description: Each slider row maps to one input. Pick the matching financial parameter.

fields.name: col1_ALabel
fields.label: Slider Label
fields.description: Text shown above the slider. Example: 'Loan Amount (Rs.)' or 'Interest Rate (%)'

fields.name: col1_ADefaultValue
fields.label: Starting Value
fields.description: Number the slider starts at when page loads. Example: 800000 for ₹8 Lakhs, or 8.5 for 8.5%

fields.name: col1_ADefaultValueIcon
fields.label: Value Symbol
fields.description: Symbol shown with the value: ₹ (currency), % (percentage), Yrs (years)

fields.name: col1_stepValue
fields.label: Step Size
fields.description: How much the slider jumps per drag. Example: 25000 means ₹25K increments, 0.25 means 0.25% increments

fields.name: col1_BMinValue
fields.label: Minimum Value
fields.description: Lowest allowed value. Example: 100000 (₹1 Lakh) or 5 (5%)

fields.name: col1_BMaxValue
fields.label: Maximum Value
fields.description: Highest allowed value. Example: 5000000 (₹50 Lakhs) or 20 (20%)

fields.name: col1_CMinValue
fields.label: Left Label (Min)
fields.description: Short text at slider left edge. Example: '1L', '5%', '1 Yr'

fields.name: col1_CMaxValue
fields.label: Right Label (Max)
fields.description: Short text at slider right edge. Example: '50L', '20%', '30 Yrs'

fields.name: col1_productType
fields.label: Loan Product
fields.description: Links these radio tabs to a loan product for analytics tracking. Leave empty for GST/APR calculators.

fields.name: col1_radioText
fields.label: Tab Label
fields.description: Text on the toggle button. Example: 'Salaried' or 'Self Employed'

fields.name: col1_radioImage
fields.label: Tab Icon
fields.description: Small icon (24×24px recommended) shown next to the label

fields.name: col1_radioImageAlt
fields.label: Icon Alt Text
fields.description: Accessibility text for screen readers

fields.name: col1_foirType
fields.label: Customer Type
fields.description: Determines the FOIR% used in eligibility calculation. Salaried = stricter, Self Employed = more flexible.

fields.name: col1_foirValue
fields.label: FOIR Percentage
fields.description: Fixed Obligation to Income Ratio — enter just the number. Example: 65 for salaried, 50 for business
